overall.description: A cinematic nighttime scene from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a neon-lit urban street with a customized lime-green sports car. The camera slowly circles the vehicle, revealing anime-style decals and futuristic architecture, before focusing on a character in a silver suit standing beside the car.

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wide neon-lit commercial plaza at night. The camera approaches a lime-green sports car parked in front of a building with bright signage, while a character in a silver suit stands near a red sports car on the right.

The background shows towering futuristic skyscrapers with glowing windows as the camera completes its circuit around the vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a wide view of a neon-lit commercial plaza and narrows its focus into a detailed circuit around a customized sports car. It begins by approaching a lime-green vehicle parked before bright commercial signage, with a character in a silver suit visible nearby. As the camera glides along the passenger side, the wide plaza recedes and the frame becomes dominated by the car's intricate anime decals and purple striping. The movement then flows toward the rear to reveal the Hydro Subsidium logo before shifting to the driver's side, where the character in the silver suit stands with arms crossed. Finally, the camera completes its orbit, framing the figure against a backdrop of towering futuristic skyscrapers with glowing windows.
